title: Wanted Recipes
description: This mod adds many useful crafting recipes
body:
This mod adds many useful crafting recipes. The crafting recipes will work automatically once the mod is installed. Here is a list of available crafting recipes:

- Anvil
- Bell
- Concrete Powder
- Brown Mushroom Block
- Chainmail Armor
- Chipped Anvil
- Cobblestone
- Cobweb
- Crying Obsidian
- Dead Bush
- Horse Armor
- Elytra
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Glow Inc Sac
- Glow Lichen
- Glowstone Dust
- Grass Block
- Leather
- Magma Block
- Mushroom Stem
- Name Tag
- Red Mushroom Block
- Saddle
- Sculk Sensor
- Shroomlight
- String
- Totem Of Undying
- Trident
